extract: Minior (Japanese: メテノ Meteno) is a dual-type Rock/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Minior can change forms during battle with its Shields Down Ability. It is normally in its Meteor Form, but when its HP is below half, its core becomes exposed. It will revert back to its Meteor Form if its HP is restored above 50%. Minior's exposed core can be one of seven non-interchangeable colors: Red Core, Orange Core, Yellow Core, Green Core, Blue Core, Indigo Core, and Violet Core.
